strategic_narrative: Mojo's Take: Google Ads is operating at a perilous 62% spend with only 23% lead generation, resulting in a troubling CPL of ₹2,287 that undermines our tCPA and ROAS. Immediate optimization of targeting and TOFU strategies is crucial to convert this spend into viable leads and rectify performance.
